title: HardenGap
description: A production-readiness gap identified during the post-parity audit phase

kind.description: The category of the production gap

description.description: Detailed explanation of why this is a gap and what needs to change

evidence.description: Log tail, code snippet, or reference to current implementation behavior

passes.description: Set to true after the hardening pass and verifier gate

verifier.description: The command or script used to verify the fix

repro_steps.description: Steps to reproduce the failure or verify the absence of the gap

dependent_on.description: IDs of other gaps that must be resolved first
